title.en: China-to-Ghana EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备进入加纳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備進入加納：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) conformity requirements, Energy Commission EV charging station authorization requirements, IEC 61851 safety and Ghana's emerging national EV charger standards, connector interoperability considerations (IEC 62196 vs GB/T 20234), ECG grid impact at 50 Hz, and Ghana EV policy framework versus Chinese GB/T 18487 baseline.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电设备文件与加纳标准局（GSA）符合性要求、能源委员会电动汽车充电站授权要求、IEC 61851安全标准及加纳新兴国家EV充电标准、连接器互操作考量（IEC 62196对比GB/T 20234）、50 Hz下ECG电网影响，以及加纳EV政策框架——对照中国GB/T 18487基准之差距分析。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電設備文件與加納標準局（GSA）符合性要求、能源委員會電動汽車充電站授權要求、IEC 61851安全標準及加納新興國家EV充電標準、連接器互操作考量（IEC 62196對比GB/T 20234）、50 Hz下ECG電網影響，以及加納EV政策框架——對照中國GB/T 18487基準之差距分析。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, GSA scope determination, Energy Commission authorization, ECG grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Ghana GSA, Energy Commission, ECG, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、GSA适用范围裁定、能源委员会授权、ECG并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行加纳GSA、能源委员会、ECG及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、GSA適用範圍裁定、能源委員會授權、ECG併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行加納GSA、能源委員會、ECG及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Ghana, GSA conformity assessment applies to imported electrical equipment and a Certificate of Conformity is required at customs. The Energy Commission has issued a directive requiring prior authorization before installing or operating EV charging stations in Ghana. Ghana has aligned with IEC 61851 (GS IEC 61851 series) as the national standard for conductive EV charging. Connector interoperability is an active policy consideration: Ghana's Energy Commission has signalled an IEC 62196 (Type 2 / Type 2 Combo CCS) direction to avoid technology lock-in, creating a gap against the GB/T 20234 connectors standard on Chinese domestic chargers. The grid operates at 50 Hz, 230/400 V. Chinese GB/T 18487 documentation does not substitute for Ghana IEC 61851-based conformity evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备出口加纳时，进口电气设备须经GSA符合性评定，海关须取得符合性证书。能源委员会已发出指令，要求在加纳安装或运营电动汽车充电站前须取得事先授权。加纳已将IEC 61851（GS IEC 61851系列）纳入导线式EV充电国家标准。连接器互操作性是活跃的政策议题：加纳能源委员会已表明倾向IEC 62196（Type 2 / Type 2 Combo CCS）方向以避免技术锁定，与中国国内充电设备采用的GB/T 20234连接器标准存在差距。电网运行于50 Hz、230/400 V。中国GB/T 18487文件不能替代基于IEC 61851的加纳符合性证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備出口加納時，進口電氣設備須經GSA符合性評定，海關須取得符合性證書。能源委員會已發出指令，要求在加納安裝或運營電動汽車充電站前須取得事先授權。加納已將IEC 61851（GS IEC 61851系列）納入導線式EV充電國家標準。連接器互操作性是活躍的政策議題：加納能源委員會已表明傾向IEC 62196（Type 2 / Type 2 Combo CCS）方向以避免技術鎖定，與中國國內充電設備採用的GB/T 20234連接器標準存在差距。電網運行於50 Hz、230/400 V。中國GB/T 18487文件不能替代基於IEC 61851的加納符合性證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
